title: cyclosorus buchananii
intro: Cyclosorus buchananii, also known as the New Zealand fern or Marsh fern, is a type of plant species in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus buchananii include reducing fever, alleviating arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
